feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Route 11 after the Thunder Badge opened Vermilion's east checkpoint.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red confirmed he is staying with Antman as the main travel companion while the road bends toward Diglett's Cave.

feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: Misty logged a temporary handoff: she will keep scouting water routes and return for major ocean and harbor crises.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill decoded a new Nexus relay pulse from Route 11, proving the signal is following the physical route network.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket and Team Gas are arguing east of Vermilion after the failed power sabotage exposed both factions.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A sleeping roadblock has been reported ahead, pushing travelers toward the Diglett's Cave detour.
